00037 
00038 package java.util;
00039 
00103 public class Date
00104 {
00108     private transient long time;
00109 
00113     private static final String[] weekNames = { "Sun", "Mon", "Tue", "Wed",
00114         "Thu", "Fri", "Sat" };
00115     
00119     private static final String[] monthNames = { "Jan", "Feb", "Mar", "Apr",
00120         "May", "Jun", "Jul", "Aug", "Sep", "Oct", "Nov", "Dec" };
00121 
00125     public Date()
00126     {
00127         time = System.currentTimeMillis();
00128     }
00129 
00135     public Date(long time)
00136     {
00137         this.time = time;
00138     }
00139 
00145     public long getTime()
00146     {
00147         return time;
00148     }
00149 
00155     public void setTime(long time)
00156     {
00157         this.time = time;
00158     }
00159 
00168     public boolean equals(Object obj)
00169     {
00170         return (obj instanceof Date && time == ((Date) obj).time);
00171     }
00172 
00180     public int hashCode()
00181     {
00182         return (int) time ^ (int) (time >>> 32);
00183     }
00184 
00238     public String toString()
00239     {
00240         Calendar cal = Calendar.getInstance();
00241         cal.setTimeInMillis(time);
00242 
00243         String day = "0" + cal.get(Calendar.DATE);
00244         String hour = "0" + cal.get(Calendar.HOUR_OF_DAY);
00245         String min = "0" + cal.get(Calendar.MINUTE);
00246         String sec = "0" + cal.get(Calendar.SECOND);
00247         String year = "000" + cal.get(Calendar.YEAR);
00248 
00249         return weekNames[cal.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_WEEK) - 1] + " "
00250             + monthNames[cal.get(Calendar.MONTH)] + " "
00251             + day.substring(day.length() - 2) + " "
00252             + hour.substring(hour.length() - 2) + ":"
00253             + min.substring(min.length() - 2) + ":"
00254             + sec.substring(sec.length() - 2) + " "
00255             + cal.getTimeZone().getID() + " " +
00256             year.substring(year.length() - 4);
00257     }
00258 }
